title: Kobo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kobo, with a Z-Score of +3.69. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching critical levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Kobo is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a Level of CRITICAL. 
 The heat wave is characterized by a high CDD of 11.9 GG, with low humidity of 24% and moderate wind of 6.9 km/h. 
 The lack of significant precipitation and high temperatures are exacerbating the heat wave, with no HDD recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
